description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with build and deploy stages. In the build stage add a style_check job using the image registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/testing:ubuntu-xenial-python36 that runs `pycodestyle d3m_metadata`. Add a type_check job with the same image that clones https://gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/primitive-interfaces.git, checks out the ${DEPENDENCY_REF} ref, and runs `MYPYPATH=primitive-interfaces mypy d3m_metadata`. Add a tests job with the same image that executes `python3 setup.py sdist`, `pip3 install --process-dependency-links dist/*`, `rm -rf d3m_metadata`, and `python3 ./run_tests.py`, and sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. In the deploy stage add a pages job using the node:6 image that runs `set -o errexit`, `cd site`, `npm install`, `make`, `cd ..`, `cp -a site/static public`, `rm -f public/schemas`, `cp -a d3m_metadata/schemas public/schemas`, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Also add a trigger_images_rebuild job using the same testing image that, only on the devel branch, conditionally posts to the GitLab pipeline trigger API with the REBUILD_IMAGE variable.
